title: SQL reference documentation for managing governed tags
body:
The Databricks SQL reference now includes documentation for five new SQL statements for managing governed tags: [CREATE GOVERNED TAG](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-create-governed-tag), [ALTER GOVERNED TAG](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-alter-governed-tag), [DROP GOVERNED TAG](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-drop-governed-tag), [DESCRIBE GOVERNED TAG](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-aux-describe-governed-tag), and [SHOW GOVERNED TAGS](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-aux-show-governed-tags).

For more information, see [Create and manage governed tags](/aws/en/admin/governed-tags/manage-governed-tags).
